description: Mock registration packet: a Dutch national resident in Germany registering as a permanent overseas voter for the Tweede Kamer, European Parliament, and kiescollege niet-ingezetenen elections, providing a BSN and a passport copy as nationality proof. Fabricated details, not a real person. The same data was entered live into the formulieren.denhaag.nl wizard (steps Verkiezingen through Uw nationaliteit) during authoring, with the wizard's own server-side validation accepting every value.

documents.identityDocumentCopy: dummy_id.txt (mock file, 28 bytes) — uploaded live via the wizard's file picker during authoring
